subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Today the righteous and perfect blessed one consisteth of words that have appeared from the Mother Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی امروز ولد صالح کامل مبارک کلماتی است که از ام الکتاب ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
